subject: docs(all): audit codebase and fix all documentation inaccuracies
body:
Full codebase read revealed two missed endpoints (publish, submissions
listing) and multiple inaccuracies across docs. Key fixes:

- CLAUDE.md: added project architecture, env vars, design patterns;
  removed glow-props-specific references (TutorialModal, sharp)
- README.md: rewrote to cover full project scope (was interest-only)
- API.md: added all 12 endpoints (was 3), fixed wrong constant path
  (api/constants.ts → lib/constants.ts), corrected CORS headers to
  match vercel.json (added PUT/DELETE/Authorization)
- TODO.md: removed already-implemented submission listing endpoint
- HISTORY.md: added missing publish + submissions listing endpoints
- USER_GUIDE.md: added missing endpoints, env vars, submission details
- TESTING_GUIDE.md: added publish + submissions scenarios, expanded
  regression checklist
- AI_MISTAKES.md: recorded missed-endpoints lesson
- SESSION_NOTES.md: updated to current session state

Tags: documentation, audit
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: developer-experience
Semver: patch

title: audit codebase and fix all documentation inaccuracies
